prompt:
Modern minimalist 1:1 hyper-realistic lifestyle photograph. NO PEOPLE, NO hands. Subtle product-color theming (soft black + gold/brass + warm teal-glow echoing the jar's brand palette).

SCENE: a clean modern bedside table — dark-walnut wood surface (subtle dark theme echoing the jar's black plastic), a soft GOLD-BRASS table lamp visible in the soft-focus background casting a warm glow (subtle brand-color cue). The Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference image — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold/yellow accents, GOLD LID, front label fully legible) sits naturally OFF-CENTER on the bedside in the right third of the frame. NO additional prop besides the jar — just the warm lamp glow in the soft-focus background.

ANGLE: a CLOSE-UP MACRO 3/4 ANGLE — the camera is intimately close to the jar at the bedside-table height, looking at it from a 3/4 angle so the front label fills most of the frame's central area. NOT head-on, NOT distant — intimate close-up 3/4.

LIGHTING: soft warm tungsten-toned light from the gold-brass lamp in the background, plus soft natural daylight from a window off-frame. The jar's curved black plastic catches a soft warm specular gleam on one side. The gold lid glows warmly from the lamp light.

FRAMING: balanced minimalist arrangement with intentional negative space, intimate close-up perspective.

BACKGROUND: out-of-focus modern bedroom — soft cream linen bedding edge, the gold-brass lamp with a warm glow, a hint of a dark wood headboard. Shallow depth-of-field.

STYLE: hyper-realistic photography, 85mm macro look, f/2.0 shallow depth, simple modern intimate composition with subtle warm brand-color cues. NO AI artifacts, NO text overlays, NO graphic elements, NO callouts.
